item.title: Palo Alto Networks’ Dip Might Be a Gift if This One Thing Holds
item.description: See why Palo Alto’s guidance cut sparked a dip, what analysts and institutions are signaling, and how ARR, RPO, and integration costs shape the setup.

item.title: Forget Chips, Buy Wires: BHP Hits Highs as Copper Overtakes Iron
item.description: Smart money is rotating into the mining sector as the artificial intelligence boom creates a massive supply shock for essential physical infrastructur...

item.title: Figma’s Anthropic Integration Could Flip the SaaSpocalypse Script
item.description: Figma delivered strong fourth-quarter results with accelerating growth that shows how artificial intelligence is becoming a core engine for its expans...

item.title: Ondas Jumps on German Police and NATO Wins—Can the Rally Hold Into Earnings?
item.description: Shares of Ondas Inc. are rallying after the company secured critical defense contracts with NATO members and German law enforcement agencies.

item.title: Shipping Shock: ZIM Shareholders Secure Massive Cash Exit
item.description: ZIM shareholders secured a cash exit when Hapag-Lloyd agreed to acquire the shipping company at a premium valuation, reshaping the logistics sector.
